Class ConcatCalculator

java.lang.Object
org.openxava.calculators.ConcatCalculator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, ICalculator
Direct Known Subclasses:
ConcatOidCalculator
public class ConcatCalculator extends Object implements ICalculator
String concatenation.

Author:
Javier Paniza
